toilets, perfumery,
millinery, music, etc He is also inclined to get involved in
litigation. The important years will be 18th, 24th, 30th,
36th, 42nd, 49th and 55th. He can also attain success as an
organiser or company promoter.
Second Drekkana (11°-20°).—The financial conditions
will be much better off. He is likely to get considerable
wealth. But care is necessary in matters of speculation.
Generally he will be close-fisted with money. The period,
Jupiter transits Scorpio, Aquarius and Cancer, will be
particularly important in his financial career. He will spend
money on wayward habits unless other favourable
influences prevail. Important years will be as in the case of
the First Drekkana.
Third Drekkana (21°-30°).—In affairs connected with
money, the early life will be much more successful than the
middle one. There will be squandering of money

114 How to Judge a Horoscope
leading to much misery. The career will be marked by
